sentences.arabic: عَنْ عُمَرَ بْنِ الْخَطَّابِ رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنْهُ، قَالَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ: «إِنَّمَا الْأَعْمَالُ بِالنِّيَّاتِ» [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ بَدْءِ الْوَحْيِ، حَدِيثُ رَقْمِ ١].
sentences.translation: Od Omera ibn el-Hattaba, radijallahu anhu, prenosi se da je Vjerovjesnik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, rekao: 'Djela se vrednuju prema namjerama' [Buhari].
sentences.translationEn: On the authority of Umar ibn al-Khattab, the Prophet (PBUH) said: 'Actions are but by intentions' [Bukhari].

sentences.arabic: يَعْنِي هَذَا الْحَدِيثُ أَنَّ كُلَّ عَمَلٍ يَقُومُ بِهِ الْمُسْلِمُ يَجِبُ أَنْ يَكُونَ خَالِصًا لِلَّهِ تَعَالَى.
sentences.translation: Ovaj hadis znači da svako djelo koje musliman čini mora biti iskreno u ime Allaha Uzvišenog.
sentences.translationEn: This hadith means that every deed a Muslim performs must be sincerely for the sake of Allah Almighty.

sentences.arabic: النِّيَّةُ الصَّالِحَةُ تُحَوِّلُ الْعَمَلَ الْبَسِيطَ إِلَى عِبَادَةٍ عَظِيمَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Dobra namjera pretvara obično djelo u veliki ibadet.
sentences.translationEn: A good intention transforms a simple action into a great act of worship.

sentences.arabic: لِذَلِكَ، يَجِبُ عَلَيْنَا أَنْ نُصَحِّحَ نِيَّاتِنَا قَبْلَ الصَّلَاةِ وَالصَّدَقَةِ وَكُلِّ خَيْرٍ.
sentences.translation: Zbog toga moramo ispraviti svoje namjere prije namaza, sadake i svakog dobra.
sentences.translationEn: Therefore, we must correct our intentions before prayer, charity, and every good deed.

sentences.arabic: هَذَا الْإِخْلَاصُ هُوَ أَسَاسُ قَبُولِ الْأَعْمَالِ عِنْدَ اللَّهِ.
sentences.translation: Ova iskrenost je osnova za primanje djela kod Allaha.
sentences.translationEn: This sincerity is the basis for the acceptance of deeds by Allah.
